recommendations.title: Brubaker
recommendations.overview: The new warden of a small prison farm in Arkansas tries to clean it up of corruption after initially posing as an inmate.

recommendations.title: High Security Vacation
recommendations.overview: Two escaped convicts pose as children's summer camp staff in order to evade capture and learn about caring for others in the process. Sumrak has been in prison since he was 16 years old but is pushing thirty now, is well acquainted with prison gang c

recommendations.title: Bullet
recommendations.overview: A tough, Jewish ex-con just released from prison crosses a powerful drug dealer and former prison rival in his return to a life of crime.

recommendations.title: Female Prisoner Scorpion: Jailhouse 41
recommendations.overview: After being used and betrayed by the detective she had fallen in love with, young Matsu is sent to a female prison full of sadistic guards and disobedient prisoners.

recommendations.title: Cool Hand Luke
recommendations.overview: When petty criminal Luke Jackson is sentenced to two years in a Florida prison farm, he doesn't play by the rules of either the sadistic warden or the yard's resident heavy, Dragline, who ends up admiring the new guy's unbreakable will. Luke's bravad

recommendations.title: Convict
recommendations.overview: Set in the dark and old Parramatta prison built by the original convicts our lead character Ray a war veteran finds himself serving 18 months for manslaughter after defending his fiance. He soon realizes that the prison boss has it in for him and doe

recommendations.title: Prison
recommendations.overview: After Charles Forsyth was sent to the electric chair for a crime he didn't commit, he forever haunts the prison where he was executed. Flash forward several years when the prison is reopened, under the control of its new warden Eaton Sharpe, a former

recommendations.title: Jawan
recommendations.overview: An emotional journey of a prison warden, driven by a personal vendetta while keeping up to a promise made years ago, recruits inmates to commit outrageous crimes that shed light on corruption and injustice, in an attempt to get even with his past,  a

recommendations.title: Excess Baggage
recommendations.overview: A rich brat fakes her own kidnapping, but in the process ends up locked in the trunk of a car that gets stolen.

recommendations.title: Sharky's Machine
recommendations.overview: Police officer Tom Sharky gets busted back to working vice, where he happens upon a scandalous conspiracy involving a local politician. Sharky's new 'machine' gathers evidence while Sharky falls in love with a woman he has never met.
